description_long: This helmet features a rounded dome with a dark green finish, accented by a maroon T-shaped visor frame on the front. The surface is weathered, showing scuffs, scratches, and a prominent dent on the upper left side, suggesting heavy use. A distinctive rangefinder antenna is mounted on the right side, extending upward and forward, with metallic and black components. The rear of the helmet displays a series of vertical yellow stripes and a rectangular vent-like detail in maroon. The left side has a gold and silver attachment, likely part of the rangefinder mechanism. The overall design is utilitarian and robust, with a science fiction aesthetic reminiscent of iconic bounty hunter gear.
description: A weathered, dark green helmet with a maroon T-shaped visor, rangefinder antenna, and yellow rear stripes, showing signs of heavy use and sci-fi styling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the maroon T-shaped visor, green dome, and the rangefinder antenna on the right side.
description_view_1: Left-front view highlights the yellow vertical stripes on the rear, the dent on the dome, and the side of the visor.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the maroon rectangular vent and the continuous green dome, with the rangefinder visible on the right.
description_view_3: Right-rear view emphasizes the gold and silver rangefinder attachment and the helmet's smooth, rounded back.
attribute_graphic_design: Weathered solid green with maroon visor frame, yellow rear stripes, and a prominent dent; no additional graphics or text.
